info.name: Souk IT Collection
info.description:
Complete API collection for Souk IT marketplace.
Base URL: https://ciywuwcwixbvmsezppya.supabase.co/functions/v1

Notifications: each item includes a 'product' field with title, description, actual_price, display_price, images.
Addresses: multi-address arrays per type (pickup / delivery), each with a unique id.

iCarry Shipping (Section 13): Integrated with https://uae.icarry.com for shipment creation and tracking.
Setup: supabase secrets set ICARRY_EMAIL=your@email.com ICARRY_PASSWORD=yourpassword

body.raw:
{
  "email": "seller@test.com",
  "password": "Test1234!",
  "first_name": "Test",
  "last_name": "Seller",
  "date_of_birth": "1990-03-20",
  "country_code": "+971",
  "phone_number": "509876543",
  "collection_address": {"address": "456 Seller Ave","town_city": "Abu Dhabi","postcode": "54321"},
  "delivery_address": {"address": "456 Seller Ave","town_city": "Abu Dhabi","postcode": "54321"}
}

item.name: 3. Products
STEP 1 — Create Product (no pickup address yet) ★

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Vintage Nike Shirt",
  "description": "Great condition vintage Nike shirt from the 90s",
  "price": 150,
  "images": [],
  "category_id": "{{category_id}}",
  "condition": "good",
  "size": "M",
  "color": "White",
  "brand": "Nike",
  "material": "Cotton",
  "location": "Dubai"
}

item.name: STEP 3 — Set Pickup Address on Product ★

item.description:
Pickup Address Flow:  
STEP 1 — Create product (no pickup_address_id needed yet)  
STEP 2 — Go to section 10 Addresses:  
Option A: Add new pickup address → address_id auto-saved to {{address_id}}  
Option B: Get existing addresses → pick an id, set {{address_id}} manually  
STEP 3 — Call 'Set Pickup Address on Product' to link address to product

item.name: 8. Notifications

exec: console.log('No product linked to this notification');

item.description: Uses /notifications-all endpoint. Each notification in 'data[]' includes a 'product' field with: id, title, description, actual_price, display_price, images, condition, brand, size, is_sold. Product is resolved from data.product_id or via data.order_id as fallback.

item.name: 10. Addresses

request.description: Login to get access_token. Token is auto-saved to collection variable.

Creates a standard delivery order. order_id is auto-saved.

Expected: { success: true, data: { order: { id, status: 'pending', ... } } }

Creates a 24h delivery order. Seller must approve/reject before payment link can be created.

Expected: { success: true, data: { requires_seller_approval: true, order: { status: 'pending' } } }

exec: console.log('👉 Open this URL in browser to pay:', res.data.payment_url);

request.description:
Creates a Mamo payment link for the order.

Rules:
- Standard order (status: pending) → returns payment_url immediately
- 24h order (delivery_request: pending) → returns 400 'Waiting for seller'
- 24h order (delivery_request: approved) → returns payment_url at AED 40
- 24h order (delivery_request: rejected/expired) → auto-switches to AED 20, returns payment_url

Expected success:
{
  success: true,
  data: {
    order_id: '...',
    payment_url: 'https://sandbox.dev.business.mamopay.com/pay/MB-LINK-...',
    mamo_link_id: 'MB-LINK-...',
    item_price: 112.5,
    delivery_price: 20,
    total_price: 132.5,
    requires_payment: true
  }
}

Open payment_url in browser and pay with:
Card: 4242 4242 4242 4242
CVV: 123
Expiry: 01/28

item.name: 04 - Verify Payment (after paying on Mamo page)

exec: console.log('✅ Payment verified! Order status:', res.data?.status);
console.log('Order NOT marked as paid — Mamo did not confirm capture');

request.description:
Verifies payment with Mamo's charges API.

After paying on the Mamo page, Mamo redirects to:
/payment-callback?status=captured&transactionId=MPB-CHRG-XXX&paymentLinkId=MB-LINK-XXX

Copy transactionId → set {{transaction_id}} variable
Copy paymentLinkId → set {{payment_link_id}} variable

This endpoint re-calls Mamo's API to confirm status === 'captured'.
Only then marks order as 'paid'.

Expected success:
{
  success: true,
  data: { status: 'paid', total_price: 132.5, ... },
  message: 'Payment completed successfully.'
}

Expected failure (not captured):
{
  success: false,
  message: 'Payment was not successful. Your order has not been updated.'
}

Simulates what Mamo sends to your webhook when payment is captured.

No auth header needed — Mamo calls this server-to-server.

The webhook will:
1. Re-verify with Mamo's charges API
2. Only if confirmed captured → mark order paid, notify seller+buyer, send emails

Expected success:
{
  success: true,
  message: 'Payment confirmed and order updated.'
}

Expected if not captured:
{
  success: false,
  message: 'Payment not verified with Mamo API.'
}

Register this webhook URL in Mamo sandbox dashboard:
https://ciywuwcwixbvmsezppya.supabase.co/functions/v1/mamo-webhook

Fetch buyer's orders to confirm status changed to 'paid'.

After successful payment:
- order.status should be 'paid'
- products.is_sold should be true

item.name: 13. iCarry Shipping
item.description:
iCarry UAE integration (https://uae.icarry.com).
Auth: Info@souk-it.com / Bertie_2311!2000 (hardcoded in edge function)
Base URL: https://uae.icarry.com/api-frontend/SmartwareShipment

FLOW:
1. Order created → payment via Mamo
2. Payment confirmed → iCarry order auto-created (non-blocking)
3. iCarry assigns tracking number → order status → 'shipped'
4. Track anytime via tracking number

NEW DB COLUMNS on orders table:
- icarry_order_id
- icarry_tracking_number
- icarry_tracking_url

Run migration: supabase/migrations/20260331000000_add_icarry_fields_to_orders.sql

request.description:
Tests iCarry authentication with Info@souk-it.com.

Expected:
{
  success: true,
  message: 'iCarry authenticated successfully',
  token_preview: 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...'
}

Gets available carrier rates for a shipment.
Calls: POST /api-frontend/SmartwareShipment/EstimateRatesForMarketplace

Use the SystemShipmentProvider + MethodId from the response when creating an order.

Creates a shipment order on iCarry UAE for a paid Souk IT order.
Calls: POST /api-frontend/SmartwareShipment/CreateOrderForMarketPlace

Prerequisites:
- Order status must be 'paid'
- This is called AUTOMATICALLY after Mamo payment confirmation
- Can also be called manually if auto-create failed

What happens:
1. Fetches order + buyer/seller profiles from Supabase
2. Calls iCarry CreateOrderForMarketPlace with buyer as dropOffAddress
3. Saves icarry_order_id + icarry_tracking_number to order
4. Updates order status to 'shipped'
5. Sends push notification to buyer with tracking number

Expected:
{
  success: true,
  data: {
    order_id: '...',
    icarry_order_id: 12345,
    icarry_tracking_number: 'IC-UAE-XXXXXX',
    icarry_tracking_url: 'https://uae.icarry.com/api-frontend/SmartwareShipment/orderTracking?trackingNumber=IC-UAE-XXXXXX'
  }
}

Tracks a shipment by Souk IT order_id.
Looks up icarry_tracking_number from the order, then calls:
GET /api-frontend/SmartwareShipment/orderTracking?trackingNumber=...

Tracks directly by iCarry tracking number (IC#).
Calls: GET /api-frontend/SmartwareShipment/orderTracking?trackingNumber={{icarry_tracking_number}}

Cancels an iCarry shipment using the IC# tracking number.
Calls: GET /api-frontend/SmartwareShipment/CancelOrder?trackingNumber=...

Lists all warehouses (pickup locations) in your iCarry account.
Calls: GET /api-frontend/Warehouse/GetAll

Use the warehouse name as pickupLocation in CreateOrderForMarketPlace.

body.raw:
{
  "Name": "Souk IT Dubai",
  "IsActive": true,
  "Address": {

request.description:
Creates a warehouse/pickup location in iCarry.
Calls: POST /api-frontend/Warehouse/createWarehouseForMarketPlace

Run this ONCE to set up your Souk IT pickup location.
The warehouse Name is used as pickupLocation in CreateOrderForMarketPlace.

Gets the PDF packaging slip / shipping label for a shipment.
Calls: GET /api-frontend/SmartwareShipment/PdfPackagingSlip/:shipmentId

Direct call to iCarry to get shipping rates.
Run '10 — Direct iCarry: GetToken' first to get {{icarry_token}}.

Note the SystemShipmentProvider and MethodId from the response — needed for CreateOrderForMarketPlace.

request.description:
Direct call to iCarry to create a marketplace shipment order.
Run '10 — Direct iCarry: GetToken' first.

PickupLocation must match a warehouse name in your iCarry account.
Run '08 — Create Warehouse' first if needed.

ProcessOrder: true → auto-processes the shipment immediately.

Direct call to iCarry to track a shipment by IC# tracking number.
Set {{icarry_tracking_number}} to the IC# returned from CreateOrderForMarketPlace.
Direct call to iCarry to cancel a shipment by IC# tracking number.

Lists all warehouses in your iCarry account.
The warehouse Name is used as pickupLocation in CreateOrderForMarketPlace.
